requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Disturbance / EMC for Lighting in Chile (NCh/IEC vs SEC scope)
requirement_topic.zh: 智利照明产品的电磁骚扰 / EMC（NCh/IEC 与 SEC 范围）
requirement_topic.zht: 智利照明產品的電磁騷擾 / EMC（NCh/IEC 與 SEC 範圍）

summary.en: Chile's electrical product approval is centred on the SEC safety certification regime, which is primarily focused on electrical safety (shock, fire, construction) rather than a standalone horizontal EMC directive like the EU EMC Directive. Chile does not, in general, operate an EU-style mandatory EMC marking for general lighting; electromagnetic disturbance characteristics are addressed mainly where they intersect SEC product safety or, for radio-emitting equipment, the SUBTEL telecom regime. Where EMC characteristics are referenced, the applicable technical basis is the IEC/CISPR family (CISPR 15 for lighting radio disturbance) adopted via INN NCh standards. Manufacturers should confirm with the SEC-authorized certifier whether EMC test evidence is required for the specific lighting product class.
summary.zh: 智利的电气产品核准以 SEC 安全认证制度为核心，该制度主要关注电气安全（触电、火灾、结构），而非像欧盟 EMC 指令那样的独立横向 EMC 指令。智利一般不对通用照明实行欧盟式强制 EMC 标志；电磁骚扰特性主要在其与 SEC 产品安全交叉处、或对于发射无线电的设备在 SUBTEL 电信制度下处理。在引用 EMC 特性时，适用技术基础为 IEC/CISPR 系列（照明无线电骚扰的 CISPR 15），通过 INN NCh 标准采纳。制造商应向 SEC 授权认证机构确认特定照明产品类别是否需要 EMC 检测证据。
summary.zht: 智利的電氣產品核准以 SEC 安全認證制度為核心，該制度主要關注電氣安全（觸電、火災、結構），而非像歐盟 EMC 指令那樣的獨立橫向 EMC 指令。智利一般不對通用照明實行歐盟式強制 EMC 標誌；電磁騷擾特性主要在其與 SEC 產品安全交叉處、或對於發射無線電的設備在 SUBTEL 電信制度下處理。在引用 EMC 特性時，適用技術基礎為 IEC/CISPR 系列（照明無線電騷擾的 CISPR 15），通過 INN NCh 標準採納。製造商應向 SEC 授權認證機構確認特定照明產品類別是否需要 EMC 檢測證據。

standards_or_laws: SEC electrical product safety certification regime (Chile — primary approval is safety-centred)
CISPR 15 / IEC family (radio disturbance of lighting equipment) — technical basis adopted via INN NCh where referenced
SUBTEL telecom regime (applies to radio-emitting / wireless luminaires)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 17743-2017 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), technically aligned with CISPR 15. GB 17743 compliance is a mandatory component of CCC certification for luminaires sold in China, tested at CNAS/CMA-accredited Chinese laboratories. The Chinese CCC EMC test report is produced for the CN market and is not a Chilean approval document.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 17743-2017（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。GB 17743 合规是在中国销售灯具的 CCC 认证强制组成部分，在中国 CNAS/CMA 认可实验室检测。中国 CCC EMC 检测报告为中国市场出具，并非智利核准文件。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 17743-2017（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。GB 17743 合規是在中國銷售燈具的 CCC 認證強制組成部分，在中國 CNAS/CMA 認可實驗室檢測。中國 CCC EMC 檢測報告為中國市場出具，並非智利核准文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743-2017 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC/SAMR, aligned with CISPR 15)

gap.en: Unlike the EU, Chile does not impose a standalone horizontal EMC directive with a separate mandatory EMC declaration for general lighting; EMC is primarily relevant either inside the SEC safety scope or under SUBTEL for radio-emitting equipment. Because both China (GB 17743) and any Chilean EMC reference share the CISPR 15 technical base, the emission-limit physics is broadly harmonised, so a product compliant with GB 17743 is technically close to CISPR 15 expectations. The practical gap is jurisdictional: the Chinese CCC EMC report is for the CN market and is not itself a Chilean approval. Manufacturers must (1) confirm with the SEC-authorized certifier whether EMC evidence is required for the specific product; (2) route any wireless luminaire through SUBTEL (see ledcl-emc-02); (3) not assume CCC EMC documentation satisfies any Chilean requirement without certifier confirmation.
gap.zh: 与欧盟不同，智利不对通用照明施加带独立强制 EMC 声明的横向 EMC 指令；EMC 主要在 SEC 安全范围内、或对于发射无线电设备在 SUBTEL 下相关。由于中国（GB 17743）与任何智利 EMC 引用同以 CISPR 15 为技术基础，发射限值物理基础大致协调，故符合 GB 17743 的产品在技术上接近 CISPR 15 预期。实际差距在于司法管辖：中国 CCC EMC 报告面向中国市场，其本身并非智利核准。制造商须：（1）向 SEC 授权认证机构确认特定产品是否需要 EMC 证据；（2）将任何无线灯具经由 SUBTEL 处理（见 ledcl-emc-02）；（3）在未经认证机构确认前，不应假定 CCC EMC 文件满足任何智利要求。
gap.zht: 與歐盟不同，智利不對通用照明施加帶獨立強制 EMC 聲明的橫向 EMC 指令；EMC 主要在 SEC 安全範圍內、或對於發射無線電設備在 SUBTEL 下相關。由於中國（GB 17743）與任何智利 EMC 引用同以 CISPR 15 為技術基礎，發射限值物理基礎大致協調，故符合 GB 17743 的產品在技術上接近 CISPR 15 預期。實際差距在於司法管轄：中國 CCC EMC 報告面向中國市場，其本身並非智利核准。製造商須：（1）向 SEC 授權認證機構確認特定產品是否需要 EMC 證據；（2）將任何無線燈具經由 SUBTEL 處理（見 ledcl-emc-02）；（3）在未經認證機構確認前，不應假定 CCC EMC 文件滿足任何智利要求。

mandatory_status.target: Scope-dependent — Chile has no standalone horizontal EMC directive for general lighting; EMC is addressed within SEC safety scope or under SUBTEL for radio-emitting equipment. Confirm requirement with the SEC-authorized certifier
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17743-2017 compliance required as part of CCC certification for luminaires sold in China

source.publisher: Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles (SEC), Chile

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chile does not operate an EU-style standalone horizontal EMC directive for general lighting; EMC is mainly relevant within the SEC safety scope or via SUBTEL for radio-emitting equipment. The CISPR 15 technical base is shared with China's GB 17743, so emission-limit physics is broadly harmonised, but the Chinese CCC EMC report is a CN-market document and is not itself a Chilean approval. Confirm with the SEC-authorized certifier whether EMC evidence is required for the specific product class, and route wireless luminaires through SUBTEL.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 智利不对通用照明实行欧盟式独立横向 EMC 指令；EMC 主要在 SEC 安全范围内、或对于发射无线电设备经由 SUBTEL 处理。CISPR 15 技术基础与中国 GB 17743 共用，故发射限值物理基础大致协调，但中国 CCC EMC 报告为中国市场文件，其本身并非智利核准。请向 SEC 授权认证机构确认特定产品类别是否需要 EMC 证据，并将无线灯具经由 SUBTEL 处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 智利不對通用照明實行歐盟式獨立橫向 EMC 指令；EMC 主要在 SEC 安全範圍內、或對於發射無線電設備經由 SUBTEL 處理。CISPR 15 技術基礎與中國 GB 17743 共用，故發射限值物理基礎大致協調，但中國 CCC EMC 報告為中國市場文件，其本身並非智利核准。請向 SEC 授權認證機構確認特定產品類別是否需要 EMC 證據，並將無線燈具經由 SUBTEL 處理。

requirement_topic.en: SUBTEL Equipment Approval for Wireless / Smart Luminaires (Chile)
requirement_topic.zh: 无线 / 智能灯具的 SUBTEL 设备核准（智利）
requirement_topic.zht: 無線 / 智能燈具的 SUBTEL 設備核准（智利）

summary.en: LED luminaires with integrated wireless functionality (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee, or other radio modules for smart/connected lighting) require equipment approval from SUBTEL (Subsecretaria de Telecomunicaciones) before being placed on the Chilean market. SUBTEL administers the type-approval/homologation of radio-emitting equipment and verifies that the device operates within authorized frequency bands and power limits for Chile. This is in addition to, and separate from, the SEC electrical safety certification. The technical basis typically references IEC/CISPR and ITU-aligned radio parameters; the manufacturer or its local representative submits the radio module test evidence to SUBTEL.
summary.zh: 集成无线功能（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee 或用于智能/联网照明的其他无线电模块）的 LED 灯具，在投放智利市场前须取得 SUBTEL（电信次级部）的设备核准。SUBTEL 负责发射无线电设备的型号核准/认证（homologacion），并核实设备在智利授权频段及功率限值内运行。此核准独立于 SEC 电气安全认证之外、并与其分开。技术基础通常引用 IEC/CISPR 及与 ITU 对齐的无线电参数；制造商或其本地代表向 SUBTEL 提交无线电模块检测证据。
summary.zht: 集成無線功能（Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee 或用於智能/聯網照明的其他無線電模組）的 LED 燈具，在投放智利市場前須取得 SUBTEL（電信次級部）的設備核准。SUBTEL 負責發射無線電設備的型號核准/認證（homologacion），並核實設備在智利授權頻段及功率限值內運行。此核准獨立於 SEC 電氣安全認證之外、並與其分開。技術基礎通常引用 IEC/CISPR 及與 ITU 對齊的無線電參數；製造商或其本地代表向 SUBTEL 提交無線電模組檢測證據。

standards_or_laws: SUBTEL (Subsecretaria de Telecomunicaciones) — equipment type-approval / homologation for radio-emitting devices (Chile)
ITU-aligned frequency band and power-limit allocations for Chile

summary.en: In China, wireless-enabled luminaires require SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) type approval for the radio module, verifying frequency, bandwidth, and transmit power against Chinese radio allocations, in addition to CCC safety certification. The Chinese SRRC approval is specific to Chinese frequency allocations and administrative rules and is not recognised by SUBTEL — the Chilean radio allocations and approval process are separate.
summary.zh: 在中国，具备无线功能的灯具除 CCC 安全认证外，其无线电模块还须取得国家无线电管理委员会（SRRC）型号核准，核实频率、带宽及发射功率是否符合中国无线电分配。中国 SRRC 核准针对中国频率分配及行政规则，不被 SUBTEL 认可——智利无线电分配及核准流程独立。
summary.zht: 在中國，具備無線功能的燈具除 CCC 安全認證外，其無線電模組還須取得國家無線電管理委員會（SRRC）型號核准，核實頻率、頻寬及發射功率是否符合中國無線電分配。中國 SRRC 核准針對中國頻率分配及行政規則，不被 SUBTEL 認可——智利無線電分配及核准流程獨立。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled equipment in China (radio module)

gap.en: Both China (SRRC) and Chile (SUBTEL) require radio-module type approval for connected luminaires, but the two regimes are jurisdiction-specific and not mutually recognised: Chinese SRRC approval does not satisfy SUBTEL, and the authorized frequency bands and power limits differ between China and Chile. Chinese manufacturers exporting smart LED luminaires must (1) verify the radio module's bands/power against Chilean allocations; (2) obtain SUBTEL equipment approval before market placement, typically through a Chilean local representative/importer; (3) keep the SUBTEL approval separate from the SEC safety certification — both are required for a connected luminaire. A non-wireless luminaire does not need SUBTEL approval but still needs SEC certification.
gap.zh: 中国（SRRC）与智利（SUBTEL）都要求联网灯具的无线电模块进行型号核准，但两套制度针对各自司法管辖且不互认：中国 SRRC 核准不满足 SUBTEL，且授权频段及功率限值在中国与智利之间不同。出口智能 LED 灯具的中国制造商须：（1）核实无线电模块的频段/功率是否符合智利分配；（2）在投放市场前取得 SUBTEL 设备核准，通常经由智利本地代表/进口商办理；（3）将 SUBTEL 核准与 SEC 安全认证分开——联网灯具两者均须具备。非无线灯具无需 SUBTEL 核准，但仍须 SEC 认证。
gap.zht: 中國（SRRC）與智利（SUBTEL）都要求聯網燈具的無線電模組進行型號核准，但兩套制度針對各自司法管轄且不互認：中國 SRRC 核准不滿足 SUBTEL，且授權頻段及功率限值在中國與智利之間不同。出口智能 LED 燈具的中國製造商須：（1）核實無線電模組的頻段/功率是否符合智利分配；（2）在投放市場前取得 SUBTEL 設備核准，通常經由智利本地代表/進口商辦理；（3）將 SUBTEL 核准與 SEC 安全認證分開——聯網燈具兩者均須具備。非無線燈具無需 SUBTEL 核准，但仍須 SEC 認證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for wireless luminaires — SUBTEL equipment approval required before market placement for any luminaire with radio functionality; separate from SEC safety certification
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for wireless luminaires — SRRC type approval required for the radio module in addition to CCC safety certification

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Smart/wireless LED luminaires require SUBTEL equipment approval in Chile before market placement, separate from and in addition to SEC safety certification. Chinese SRRC approval does not satisfy SUBTEL, and Chilean frequency bands/power limits differ from China's. Verify the radio module against Chilean allocations and obtain SUBTEL approval, typically via a Chilean importer/local representative. Non-wireless luminaires do not need SUBTEL but still require SEC certification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 智能/无线 LED 灯具在智利投放市场前须取得 SUBTEL 设备核准，独立于并附加于 SEC 安全认证。中国 SRRC 核准不满足 SUBTEL，且智利频段/功率限值与中国不同。请核实无线电模块是否符合智利分配并取得 SUBTEL 核准，通常经由智利进口商/本地代表办理。非无线灯具无需 SUBTEL，但仍须 SEC 认证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 智能/無線 LED 燈具在智利投放市場前須取得 SUBTEL 設備核准，獨立於並附加於 SEC 安全認證。中國 SRRC 核准不滿足 SUBTEL，且智利頻段/功率限值與中國不同。請核實無線電模組是否符合智利分配並取得 SUBTEL 核准，通常經由智利進口商/本地代表辦理。非無線燈具無需 SUBTEL，但仍須 SEC 認證。
